---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-30"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

df <- read.table("summary.tsv", header=TRUE, sep="\t")

# rename strains
df$Strain <- recode(df$Strain,
  "Bl-ODIWGS87" = "B. longum (Duodenum)",
  "Bl-ODIWGS93" = "B. longum (Ascending colon)"
)

# order categories
df$Category <- factor(df$Category, levels=c(
  "Carbohydrate_metabolism",
  "Transporters",
  "Regulation",
  "Mobile_elements",
  "Stress_resistance",
  "Adhesion_host_interaction"
))
df$Category <- recode(df$Category,
  "Carbohydrate_metabolism" = "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "Transporters" = "Transporters",
  "Regulation" = "Regulation",
  "Mobile_elements" = "Mobile elements",
  "Stress_resistance" = "Stress response",
  "Adhesion_host_interaction" = "Host interaction"
)
# plot
p1<-ggplot(df, aes(x=Category, y=Count, fill=Strain)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(width=0.8)) +
  
  # pink / purple palette
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(
    "B. longum (Duodenum)" = "#E78AC3",      # soft pink
    "B. longum (Ascending colon)" = "#8DA0CB" # soft purple-blue
  )) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title="Strain-specific functional differences",
    y="Number of unique genes",
    x=""
  )

p1
ggsave("unique_gene_two_Bifido.png", plot=p1, dpi=600)
```
* proportion
Because total unique genes differ (279 vs 301), normalize
```{r}
df <- df %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>%
  mutate(prop = Count / sum(Count))

ggplot(df, aes(x=Category, y=prop, fill=Strain)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1)) +
  labs(title="Relative functional composition of unique genes",
       y="Proportion",
       x="")
```
```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

df <- read.table("summary.tsv", header=TRUE, sep="\t")

# rename strains
df$Strain <- recode(df$Strain,
  "Bl-ODIWGS87" = "B. longum (Duodenum)",
  "Bl-ODIWGS93" = "B. longum (Ascending colon)"
)

# rename categories
df$Category <- recode(df$Category,
  "Carbohydrate_metabolism" = "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "Transporters" = "Transporters",
  "Regulation" = "Regulation",
  "Mobile_elements" = "Mobile elements",
  "Stress_resistance" = "Stress response",
  "Adhesion_host_interaction" = "Host interaction"
)

# reshape
df_wide <- df %>%
  select(Strain, Category, Count) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Strain, values_from = Count)

# compute difference
df_wide$diff <- df_wide$`B. longum (Duodenum)` - df_wide$`B. longum (Ascending colon)`

# remove no-difference categories
df_wide <- df_wide %>%
  filter(diff != 0)

# direction
df_wide$Direction <- ifelse(
  df_wide$diff > 0,
  "Duodenum enriched",
  "Ascending colon enriched"
)

# reorder by magnitude
df_wide <- df_wide %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(diff))) %>%
  mutate(Category = factor(Category, levels = Category))

# plot
p2 <- ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = Category, y = diff, fill = Direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Duodenum enriched" = "#E78AC3",
      "Ascending colon enriched" = "#8DA0CB"
    )
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    y = "Difference in number of unique genes\n(Duodenum - Ascending colon)",
    x = ""
  )

p2

ggsave("bar_difference_two_bifido.png", plot = p2, dpi = 600, width = 6, height = 4)
```

# pan genome
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

df <- read.table(
  "pangenome_status.tsv",
  sep = "\t",
  header = FALSE,
  col.names = c("Gene", "Strain", "Status")
)

df$Strain <- recode(df$Strain,
  "Bl-ODIWGS87" = "B. longum (Duodenum)",
  "Bl-ODIWGS93" = "B. longum (Ascending colon)"
)

ggplot(df, aes(x = Gene, y = Strain, fill = Status)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "shared" = "#D9D9D9",
    "unique" = "#D81B60"
  )) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pan-genome presence/absence profile",
    x = "Gene clusters",
    y = ""
  )
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)


d1 <- read.table(
  file.path("Bl-ODIWGS87.unique_gene_coordinates.tsv"),
  sep = "\t", header = FALSE,
  col.names = c("Contig", "Start", "End", "Strand", "Gene")
)

d2 <- read.table(
  file.path("Bl-ODIWGS93.unique_gene_coordinates.tsv"),
  sep = "\t", header = FALSE,
  col.names = c("Contig", "Start", "End", "Strand", "Gene")
)

d1$Strain <- "B. longum (Duodenum)"
d2$Strain <- "B. longum (Ascending colon)"

df <- bind_rows(d1, d2)

# keep only larger contigs to avoid too much clutter
top_contigs <- df %>%
  group_by(Strain, Contig) %>%
  summarise(max_pos = max(End), n_unique = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Strain) %>%
  slice_max(max_pos, n = 20)

df_plot <- df %>%
  inner_join(top_contigs, by = c("Strain", "Contig"))

ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = Start, xend = End, y = Contig, yend = Contig)) +
  geom_segment(linewidth = 2, color = "#D81B60") +
  facet_wrap(~Strain, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "italic"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of strain-specific genes across assemblies",
    x = "Genomic position",
    y = "Contig"
  )
```
# alignment 
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)


# unique genes
u87 <- read.table(file.path( "Bl-ODIWGS87.unique_gene_coordinates.tsv"),
                  sep="\t", header=FALSE,
                  col.names=c("Contig","Start","End","Strand","Gene"))

u93 <- read.table(file.path( "Bl-ODIWGS93.unique_gene_coordinates.tsv"),
                  sep="\t", header=FALSE,
                  col.names=c("Contig","Start","End","Strand","Gene"))

u87$Strain <- "B. longum (Duodenum)"
u93$Strain <- "B. longum (Ascending colon)"

# contig lengths
len87 <- read.table(file.path("Bl-ODIWGS87.contig_lengths.tsv"),
                    header=FALSE, col.names=c("Contig","Length"))

len93 <- read.table(file.path("Bl-ODIWGS93.contig_lengths.tsv"),
                    header=FALSE, col.names=c("Contig","Length"))

# keep top 8 contigs from each genome to avoid clutter
top87 <- len87 %>% slice_max(Length, n=8)
top93 <- len93 %>% slice_max(Length, n=8)

u87p <- u87 %>% semi_join(top87, by="Contig")
u93p <- u93 %>% semi_join(top93, by="Contig")

# plot unique genes as segments on contigs
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(
    data=u87p,
    aes(x=Start, xend=End, y=Contig, yend=Contig),
    color="#D81B60",
    linewidth=2
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data=u93p,
    aes(x=Start, xend=End, y=Contig, yend=Contig),
    color="#6A1B9A",
    linewidth=2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Strain, scales="free_y") +
  theme_bw(base_size=12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y=element_text(size=7),
    strip.text=element_text(face="italic"),
    plot.title=element_text(hjust=0.5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title="Strain-specific genes across aligned genome assemblies",
    x="Genomic position",
    y="Contig"
  )

p
```
* cirle
```{r}
library(circlize)
library(dplyr)

u87 <- read.table(
  "Bl-ODIWGS87.unique_gene_coordinates.tsv",
  sep = "\t", header = FALSE,
  col.names = c("Contig", "Start", "End", "Strand", "Gene")
)

u93 <- read.table(
  "Bl-ODIWGS93.unique_gene_coordinates.tsv",
  sep = "\t", header = FALSE,
  col.names = c("Contig", "Start", "End", "Strand", "Gene")
)

len87 <- read.table(
  "Bl-ODIWGS87.contig_lengths.tsv",
  header = FALSE,
  col.names = c("Contig", "Length")
)

len93 <- read.table(
  "Bl-ODIWGS93.contig_lengths.tsv",
  header = FALSE,
  col.names = c("Contig", "Length")
)

# keep top contigs to avoid overcrowding
top87 <- len87 %>%
  arrange(desc(Length)) %>%
  slice(1:12) %>%
  mutate(
    Genome = "Duodenum",
    Contig_short = paste0("D", row_number(), " (", round(Length / 1000, 1), " kb)")
  )

top93 <- len93 %>%
  arrange(desc(Length)) %>%
  slice(1:12) %>%
  mutate(
    Genome = "Ascending_colon",
    Contig_short = paste0("AC", row_number(), " (", round(Length / 1000, 1), " kb)")
  )

u87 <- u87 %>% semi_join(top87, by = "Contig")
u93 <- u93 %>% semi_join(top93, by = "Contig")

len_all <- bind_rows(top87, top93) %>%
  mutate(Sector = paste(Genome, Contig, sep = "|"))

u87 <- u87 %>%
  mutate(Sector = paste("Duodenum", Contig, sep = "|"))

u93 <- u93 %>%
  mutate(Sector = paste("Ascending_colon", Contig, sep = "|"))

# map long contig names to clean labels
contig_map <- setNames(len_all$Contig_short, len_all$Sector)

circos.clear()
circos.par(
  start.degree = 90,
  gap.degree = 1,
  track.margin = c(0.01, 0.01)
)

circos.initialize(
  factors = len_all$Sector,
  xlim = cbind(rep(0, nrow(len_all)), len_all$Length)
)

# contig ring
circos.trackPlotRegion(
  ylim = c(0, 1),
  panel.fun = function(x, y) {
    sector <- CELL_META$sector.index
    genome <- strsplit(sector, "\\|")[[1]][1]

    col <- ifelse(genome == "Duodenum", "#F3C1D8", "#D8B4F8")

    circos.rect(
      CELL_META$xlim[1], 0.25,
      CELL_META$xlim[2], 0.75,
      col = col,
      border = "grey40"
    )

    circos.text(
      mean(CELL_META$xlim),
      1.1,
      contig_map[sector],
      cex = 0.45,
      facing = "clockwise",
      niceFacing = TRUE
    )
  },
  bg.border = NA
)

# unique genes: Duodenum
for (i in seq_len(nrow(u87))) {
  circos.rect(
    sector.index = u87$Sector[i],
    xleft = u87$Start[i],
    xright = u87$End[i],
    ybottom = 0.78,
    ytop = 1.0,
    col = "#D81B60",
    border = NA
  )
}

# unique genes: Ascending colon
for (i in seq_len(nrow(u93))) {
  circos.rect(
    sector.index = u93$Sector[i],
    xleft = u93$Start[i],
    xright = u93$End[i],
    ybottom = 0.00,
    ytop = 0.22,
    col = "#6A1B9A",
    border = NA
  )
}

title("Circular genome map of strain-specific genes")

legend(
  "bottomleft",
  legend = c(
    "B. longum (Duodenum)",
    "B. longum (Ascending colon)",
    "Duodenum-specific genes",
    "Ascending-colon-specific genes"
  ),
  fill = c("#F3C1D8", "#D8B4F8", "#D81B60", "#6A1B9A"),
  border = NA,
  cex = 0.8
)

```

# (used) circle alignent and unique gene for two strains
```{r}
library(circlize)
library(dplyr)

# -------------------------
# Read files
# -------------------------
u87 <- read.table(
  "Bl-ODIWGS87.unique_gene_coordinates.tsv",
  sep="\t", header=FALSE,
  col.names=c("Contig","Start","End","Strand","Gene")
)

u93 <- read.table(
  "Bl-ODIWGS93.unique_gene_coordinates.tsv",
  sep="\t", header=FALSE,
  col.names=c("Contig","Start","End","Strand","Gene")
)

s87 <- read.table(
  "Bl-ODIWGS87.shared_gene_coordinates.tsv",
  sep="\t", header=FALSE,
  col.names=c("Contig","Start","End","Strand","Gene")
)

s93 <- read.table(
  "Bl-ODIWGS93.shared_gene_coordinates.tsv",
  sep="\t", header=FALSE,
  col.names=c("Contig","Start","End","Strand","Gene")
)

len87 <- read.table(
  "Bl-ODIWGS87.contig_lengths.tsv",
  header=FALSE,
  col.names=c("Contig","Length")
)

len93 <- read.table(
  "Bl-ODIWGS93.contig_lengths.tsv",
  header=FALSE,
  col.names=c("Contig","Length")
)

# -------------------------
# Use one strain as reference sectors
# Here: Ascending colon as outer/reference layout
# -------------------------
top93 <- len93 %>%
  arrange(desc(Length)) %>%
  slice(1:12) %>%
  mutate(
    Contig_short = paste0("AC", row_number(), " (", round(Length/1000, 1), " kb)")
  )

# Only show genes on top contigs
u93p <- u93 %>% semi_join(top93, by="Contig")
s93p <- s93 %>% semi_join(top93, by="Contig")

# For duodenum, use its own top contigs as separate sectors
top87 <- len87 %>%
  arrange(desc(Length)) %>%
  slice(1:12) %>%
  mutate(
    Contig_short = paste0("D", row_number(), " (", round(Length/1000, 1), " kb)")
  )

u87p <- u87 %>% semi_join(top87, by="Contig")
s87p <- s87 %>% semi_join(top87, by="Contig")

# Combine sectors from both genomes
top93$Genome <- "Ascending_colon"
top87$Genome <- "Duodenum"

len_all <- bind_rows(top93, top87) %>%
  mutate(Sector = paste(Genome, Contig, sep="|"))

u93p$Sector <- paste("Ascending_colon", u93p$Contig, sep="|")
s93p$Sector <- paste("Ascending_colon", s93p$Contig, sep="|")
u87p$Sector <- paste("Duodenum", u87p$Contig, sep="|")
s87p$Sector <- paste("Duodenum", s87p$Contig, sep="|")

contig_map <- setNames(len_all$Contig_short, len_all$Sector)

# -------------------------
# Colors
# -------------------------
col_shared <- "#BDBDBD"      # shared genes
col_duo_unique <- "#D81B60"  # duodenum unique
col_col_unique <- "#6A1B9A"  # ascending colon unique
col_duo_bg <- "#F3C1D8"
col_col_bg <- "#D8B4F8"

# -------------------------
# Plot
# -------------------------
png(
  "circular_genome_plot.png",
  width = 7,
  height = 7,
  units = "in",
  res = 600
)

par(mar = c(2, 2, 2, 6))  # extra space on right

circos.clear()
circos.par(
  start.degree = 90,
  gap.degree = 1,
  track.margin = c(0.005, 0.005),
  cell.padding = c(0, 0, 0, 0)
)

circos.initialize(
  factors = len_all$Sector,
  xlim = cbind(rep(0, nrow(len_all)), len_all$Length)
)

# Track 1: contig backbone
circos.trackPlotRegion(
  ylim = c(0, 1),
  track.height = 0.08,
  panel.fun = function(x, y) {
    sector <- CELL_META$sector.index
    genome <- strsplit(sector, "\\|")[[1]][1]

    bg_col <- ifelse(genome == "Ascending_colon", col_col_bg, col_duo_bg)

    circos.rect(
      CELL_META$xlim[1], 0.25,
      CELL_META$xlim[2], 0.75,
      col = bg_col,
      border = "grey40"
    )

    circos.text(
      mean(CELL_META$xlim),
      1.2,
      contig_map[sector],
      cex = 0.35,
      facing = "clockwise",
      niceFacing = TRUE
    )
  },
  bg.border = NA
)

# Track 2: shared genes
circos.trackPlotRegion(
  ylim = c(0, 1),
  track.height = 0.08,
  panel.fun = function(x, y) {},
  bg.border = NA
)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(s93p))) {
  circos.rect(
    sector.index = s93p$Sector[i],
    xleft = s93p$Start[i],
    xright = s93p$End[i],
    ybottom = 0.15,
    ytop = 0.85,
    col = col_shared,
    border = NA
  )
}

for (i in seq_len(nrow(s87p))) {
  circos.rect(
    sector.index = s87p$Sector[i],
    xleft = s87p$Start[i],
    xright = s87p$End[i],
    ybottom = 0.15,
    ytop = 0.85,
    col = col_shared,
    border = NA
  )
}

# Track 3: unique genes
circos.trackPlotRegion(
  ylim = c(0, 1),
  track.height = 0.08,
  panel.fun = function(x, y) {},
  bg.border = NA
)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(u93p))) {
  circos.rect(
    sector.index = u93p$Sector[i],
    xleft = u93p$Start[i],
    xright = u93p$End[i],
    ybottom = 0.15,
    ytop = 0.85,
    col = col_col_unique,
    border = NA
  )
}

for (i in seq_len(nrow(u87p))) {
  circos.rect(
    sector.index = u87p$Sector[i],
    xleft = u87p$Start[i],
    xright = u87p$End[i],
    ybottom = 0.15,
    ytop = 0.85,
    col = col_duo_unique,
    border = NA
  )
}

title("Circular genome map of shared and strain-specific genes")

dev.off()
```
* export legend
```{r}
png(
  "legend_only.png",
  width = 4000,   # increase width to avoid cropping
  height = 1200,
  res = 600
)

par(mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0), xpd = NA)
plot.new()

legend(
  "center",
  legend = c(
    "Shared genes",
    "Duodenum-specific genes",
    "AscendingColon-specific genes",
    "Duodenum strain contigs",
    "AscendingColon strain contigs"
  ),
  fill = c(
    col_shared,
    col_duo_unique,
    col_col_unique,
    col_duo_bg,
    col_col_bg
  ),
  ncol = 2,        # wrap into 2 columns (important)
  border = NA,
  cex = 1.2,
  bty = "n"
)

dev.off()
```
